description_long: This object is a modern, angular fighter jet with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept wings. The body is primarily gray with a dark, tinted cockpit canopy positioned near the front, suggesting a single-seat, enclosed cockpit. The wings are mid-mounted and sharply swept back, with vertical stabilizers canted outward in a V-tail configuration. The rear of the jet features a prominent, circular exhaust nozzle, indicating a single jet engine. The underside of the wings and fuselage appear smooth, with no visible landing gear extended. The overall design is reminiscent of stealth aircraft, with clean lines and minimal surface protrusions.
description: A sleek, gray modern fighter jet with swept-back wings, a tinted forward cockpit, and a V-tail configuration.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the sharply swept wings, angular V-tail, and forward-positioned cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the circular jet exhaust, outward-canted V-tail fins, and broad wing span.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the cockpit and wing sweep.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full wing span, V-tail configuration, and central cockpit canopy.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with circular exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, not visible in current views.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat, enclosed cockpit with a tinted canopy.
